responses.en:
Ozone Urbana — Grade C · Risk Score 9/100

Vantis flags this case across all five databases:

▸ Kaveri 2.0: 179 acres Kannehalli transferred to promoter's wife post-RERA — undisclosed beneficial interest
▸ Bhoomi: Survey 84/1A land reclassified B-Kharab (govt) after DC revoked conversion Oct 2021
▸ eCourts: 14 active cases including ED FEMA attachment ₹423.38 Cr (CC 441/2024)
▸ BBMP: Plan sanction expired 2020 — 92 Avenue + 13 Aqua-2 flats built without valid sanction
▸ Satellite: 6.2-acre rajakaluve encroachment — demolition notice served Jan 2024

K-RERA ordered refund of ₹927.22 Cr to 1,847 homebuyers. ED attachment blocks recovery.

Vantis would have graded this C and flagged it in Q3 2020 — 8 quarters before the FIR.
responses.kn:
ಓಝೋನ್ ಅರ್ಬನಾ — ಗ್ರೇಡ್ C · ರಿಸ್ಕ್ ಸ್ಕೋರ್ 9/100

Vantis ಐದು ಡೇಟಾಬೇಸ್‌ಗಳಲ್ಲಿ ಈ ಪ್ರಕರಣವನ್ನು ಫ್ಲ್ಯಾಗ್ ಮಾಡುತ್ತದೆ.

₹927.22 ಕೋಟಿ ಸಂಗ್ರಹ · ED ₹423.38 ಕೋಟಿ ಜೋಡಣೆ · 1,847 ಖರೀದಿದಾರರು ಮನೆ ಇಲ್ಲದೆ ಉಳಿದಿದ್ದಾರೆ.

responses.en:
Running a JDA partner check requires a name or survey number. Here's what Vantis does:

1. eCourts scan — all cases where the party is plaintiff or defendant across all Karnataka courts
2. Kaveri scan — all transactions where the party appears as seller/buyer/mortgagor (last 15 years)
3. K-RERA cross-check — any previous project registrations or violations
4. Bhoomi check — land holdings and any pending disputes

Common red flags we catch:
▸ Hidden partition suits between family members (common in agricultural land)
▸ Prior mortgage not disclosed before JDA signing
▸ Same promoter name in two or more failed RERA projects
▸ Benami land transfers before sale

Try: go to the Litigation module and enter a name or survey number. I'll surface everything from eCourts + Kaveri.
responses.kn: JDA ಪಾಲುದಾರ ಪರಿಶೀಲನೆ: eCourts + Kaveri ಸ್ಕ್ಯಾನ್ ಒಂದೇ ಸ್ಕ್ರೀನ್‌ನಲ್ಲಿ. Litigation ಮಾಡ್ಯೂಲ್‌ಗೆ ಹೋಗಿ.

1. 179 ACRES — Kannehalli, Survey 112/1

2. 4.5 ACRES — Devanahalli Survey 84/1A
   Transferred post-RERA (not disclosed) — ₹28 Cr registered value
   Part of ED attachment order

3. 92 AVENUE FLATS (unsold inventory)
   ~148 flats valued ₹84 Cr at current distressed prices
   Available for attachment under homebuyer refund order

4. 13 AQUA-2 FLATS
   Valued ₹9.2 Cr — part of same ED proceeding

5. PROMOTER PERSONAL ASSETS
   3 residential properties (Koramangala, Indiranagar) — court freeze pending

Total traceable: ₹544 Cr · Recovery ordered: ₹927.22 Cr · Gap: ₹383 Cr

Vantis surfaces this through Kaveri + Bhoomi cross-indexing on promoter name and related parties.

responses.en:
Mantri Techzone — Grade C · Risk Score 15/100

NGT Fine: ₹117.35 Crore (National Green Tribunal Order, 2019)
Reason: Construction within 75m buffer of Bellandur Lake (Varthur Hobli Survey 22/1)

Vantis flags:
▸ eCourts: NGT Appln 481/2019 — demolition + fine order, not vacated
▸ BBMP: Plan sanction issued without mandatory lake buffer NOC
▸ Satellite: 2.4-acre encroachment on lake bed (2022 imagery)
▸ QPR: Not filed since Q1 2023 — ₹320L penalty accrued

Project status: Construction halted by NGT order. 190,000 sqft sold space in legal limbo.

This is why Vantis checks BBMP + satellite before Kaveri. The encroachment shows 18 months before any court filing.
responses.kn: Mantri Techzone — ಗ್ರೇಡ್ C · NGT ದಂಡ ₹117.35 ಕೋಟಿ · ಬೆಳ್ಳಂದೂರು ಸರೋವರ ಬಫರ್ ಉಲ್ಲಂಘನೆ

🔴 Bhoomi: 0.8 acres E-category (tank bed) included in project — not buildable
🔴 BBMP: G+18 vs sanctioned G+14 — stop-work notice active Jun 2023
🔴 eCourts: Bank of Baroda foreclosure suit OS 841/2024

Penalty accrued: ₹32.5L (QPR Q4 2024 + Q1 2025 missed)
108 homebuyers affected · Possession due Dec 2023 (missed)

Recommend: Engage legal counsel immediately on mortgage disclosure and BBMP stop-work.

responses.en:
The Vantis Lender Data Room packages government-verified data for construction finance:

✓ K-RERA registration + QPR history (5-year)
✓ Kaveri title chain (encumbrance-free certificate equivalent)
✓ Bhoomi RTC + mutation extract
✓ BBMP plan sanction status
✓ eCourts clean chit (no pending litigation)
✓ Escrow account compliance score

Banks accept Vantis data rooms because:
• Each record is sourced directly from the government DB (not self-reported)
• API output is timestamped and signed (tamper-evident)
• Reduces legal DD from 4-6 weeks to 3-5 days

Go to the Data Room module to generate a lender package for any project.
responses.kn: Vantis Lender Data Room — ಸರ್ಕಾರ-ಪರಿಶೀಲಿತ ಡೇಟಾ · ಕಾನೂನು DD 4-6 ವಾರದಿಂದ 3-5 ದಿನಕ್ಕೆ ಕಡಿಮೆ

responses.en:
Vantis Feasibility Engine — how it works:

1. Input a parcel (survey number or RERA-registered land)
2. Vantis checks BBMP zoning to determine applicable FSI/FAR
3. Calculates max buildable area by use type (residential/commercial)
4. Generates optimal product mix based on demand data from Kaveri registrations in that micro-market
5. Produces a rough financial model (land cost → construction → revenue → margin)

Example — 5-acre Whitefield parcel (residential zone, FSI 2.75):
• Max built-up: ~5.9 lakh sqft
• Optimal mix: 60% 2BHK (900-1,100 sqft) + 30% 3BHK (1,400-1,600 sqft) + 10% 4BHK
• Projected revenue: ₹578 Cr (at ₹9,800/sqft)
• Estimated margin: ₹94-112 Cr (16-19%)

Go to the Feasibility module to run your parcel.
responses.kn: Vantis Feasibility Engine — ಪಾರ್ಸೆಲ್ → FSI → ಉತ್ಪನ್ನ ಮಿಶ್ರಣ → ಹಣಕಾಸು ಮಾದರಿ. Feasibility ಮಾಡ್ಯೂಲ್‌ಗೆ ಹೋಗಿ.
